Yusuf Fahmy and Sunbul Sayedi Delivered Speeches Representing the Class of 2025 at Our Graduation Ceremony

04.07.2025

During the Graduation Ceremony, Yusuf Fahmy, a graduate of the Department of Political Science and International Relations, delivered a speech on behalf of the undergraduate class, while Sunbul Sayedi, a graduate of the Alliance of Civilizations Institute, spoke on behalf of the graduate students.

The 7th Graduation Ceremony of Ibn Haldun University was held at our complex on June 28, 2025. During the ceremony, Yusuf Fahmy delivered a speech on behalf of the undergraduate graduates, while Sunbul Sayedi spoke on behalf of the graduate students.

In their speeches, our graduates emphasized the mission and vision of our university, highlighting our principle of "Intellectual Independence." Sayedi noted that she learned critical thinking throughout her education at Ibn Haldun University; meanwhile, Fahmy emphasized that as the leaders of tomorrow, today's graduates and the new generation must have the courage to speak up and take action.

Video Recordings of the Graduation Speeches

We wish our graduates continued success.
